title: Rich Text in Long Text Column on Portfolio Board

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow the Text fields on the Portfolio boards to allow for rich text formatting. Key here is they can be seen on both the overview page and in the column of the Portfolio board.

What are you trying to achieve

Portfolio Board and project overview allow for same columns to have Rich Text formatting basics: 1) Numbering or bullets, bolding. Colors would be great too.
